title: CRM application
description: A CRM-style mobile app developed during my internship. Built with React Native, Expo, and TypeScript, featuring encrypted API communication against an existing backend server.

title: InnoviaHub
description: Full-stack office booking and user management app using React and .NET 9.

title: FrienDate
description: A project aiming to help people coordinate schedules and suggest weather-based group activities.

title: SpaMedSpa
description: A React-based app for booking spa treatments, built with React, TypeScript, Vite, and Tailwind CSS.

title: FilmStudio
description: A fullstack app for managing film rentals between studios and cinemas, featuring a custom REST API, authentication, and film inventory management.
